title: The True Herobrine Experience
body:
# True Herobrine Experience:
A captivating Minecraft modpack that immerses players into the nostalgic realm of Minecraft Alpha while incorporating the spine-chilling presence of Herobrine. Prepare to embark on a thrilling adventure filled with retro gameplay mechanics and the eerie aura of the legendary Herobrine.

# SETTINGS:
When creating a world, 
go to world tab and select world type "modern beta" and then select either alpha or beta, whatever you like

Give yourself OP and type the command "/function fromthefog:admin/config", go to page 2 and go to "Herobrine skin", 
change the skin to "classic" (its next to default herobrine), and then deop yourself so you not cheat, also you can build a shrine to summon him :)

# Credits:
Modern Beta: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/modern-beta
Nostalgia+: https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/programmer-art-nostalgia-return-s/
Golden Days: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/golden-days
Modern Beta: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/modern-beta

Other people's mods are in "dependencies" tab

Have fun ;)
